title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Celestial Dragons, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Kuma, Unknown person #12 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My wife is different! Please let my son go!

dialogue.text: Stop Dilly Dallying around and move faster!

dialogue.text: Dad....! My master is so nice...I'm so lucky to have him.
